Philosophy: Combat is designed around high survivability, sustained pressure, tactical positioning, and fast reactive spell execution. Spell combat utilizes instant-cast Spells with short category-specific cooldowns and global cooldowns, while scaling damage based on class design (weapon-centric vs spell-centric).

CanonicalRules.Text: Combat is designed around high survivability, sustained pressure, tactical positioning, and fast reactive spell execution.
Skills are divided into three cooldown categories: Basic (0–4s), Strong (8–15s), Ultimate (15–20s).
All active skills trigger a global cooldown of 0.35 seconds to prevent instant burst stacking and macro abuse.
All spells and active skills are instant cast. Combat pacing relies on cooldowns, positioning, and mana flow instead of cast-time delays.
Weapon-centric classes primarily deal damage through weapon scaling, while spell-centric classes primarily deal damage through spell scaling.
Spell power scales from weapon magical base, magic level, and elemental affinity.
Mana regenerates passively over time and through successful combat hits, functioning as a pacing regulator rather than a hard combat limiter.
Healing scales from weapon magical base, magic level, and holy amplification.
Spells can critically strike using the global critical hit system.
Crowd control exists in limited form and must never dominate combat pacing.
Area damage uses progressive soft target caps to prevent large-scale scaling abuse.
Buffs stack by category exclusivity rather than unrestricted stacking.
Party members are protected from allied AoE damage. Non-party targets remain vulnerable.
The Assassin critical hit multiplier override (2.2x) applies to every valid outgoing damage source, including physical, magical, skill-based, and elemental damage.
Every spell and skill belongs to one canonical category: Damage, Heal, Buff, Debuff, Mobility, or Utility.

SpellScalingFormula.Description: Traditional attributes are forbidden. Spell power scales only from weapon magical base, magic level, and elemental affinity.

AoEScalingFormula.Formula: Multiplier = f(Targets): 1-5 targets = 100%, 6-10 targets = 80%, 11-20 targets = 60%, 20+ targets = 40% damage
AoEScalingFormula.Description: Area damage uses progressive soft target caps to prevent large-scale scaling abuse.

HealingScalingFormula.Description: Healing strength scales from weapon magical base, magic level, and holy amplification. Works at 100% effectiveness in PvP.
